nodes.title: Get Profit Loss Report
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/profit-loss with query startDate and endDate. Returns aggregated revenue and expenses for period. Returns 200 with {totalRevenue, totalExpenses, netProfit, details}.

nodes.title: Get Trial Balance
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/trial-balance with optional date. Returns trial balance data. Returns 200 with array of account balances.
